_meta.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 team performance profiles — playing styles, player stats, WC stats, prediction factors
_meta.source: ESPN Power Rankings, Goal.com, Sofascore, CBS Sports, xGscore.io, tournament observation
_meta.how_to_use: Load via collectors/wc_results_collector.get_team_analysis(). Used by composite_model for style/xG adjustments.

Germany.style_description: High-intensity pressing, fast vertical transitions, technical midfield, wing play. Young exciting squad led by world-class experience. Super-sub Undav proven match-winner off bench.
weaknesses: can be caught on counter when pressing high

key_players.name: Deniz Undav
key_players.form: on fire - 3 goals in 1 game vs Ivory Coast

prediction_factors.note: Tournament statement. Best xG from home games (3.06). Strong favorites for group win.

USA.style_description: Well-organized mid-block with vertical counter-pressing. Direct transitions, wing play wide, target man Balogun. Strong collective unit. First US team to win their WC group since 2010.

prediction_factors.note: Won Group D. Host nation boost. Pulisic injury may impact knockout rounds.

Brazil.style_description: Classic samba football with modern pressing. Creative front three rotating around Vinicius Jr. Strong midfield duo in Bruno Guimarães/Paqueta. Morocco draw showed vulnerability vs deep blocks.
weaknesses: can be frustrated by compact low-blocks

prediction_factors.note: Morocco draw slightly dampened, but 3-0 vs Haiti impressive. Still top-3 WC contenders.

Morocco.style_description: Compact defensive structure inspired by 2022 WC semi-final run. Hakimi bombing forward, Saibari as false-9 creative pivot. Brahim Díaz inventive from right midfield. Set piece threat. Organized and dangerous on break.

key_players.name: Ismael Saibari
key_players.form: excellent - goal vs Brazil was WC classic

prediction_factors.note: Ranked 7th in world. Africa's strongest team. Low xG style but clinical and defensively elite.

Netherlands.style_description: Dutch total football evolved. Van Dijk dominant in defense. Gakpo and Depay leading attack. Drew vs Japan in MD1 (unexpected) then demolished Sweden 5-1. High pressing with technical quality.
weaknesses: Japan draw suggests vulnerability to counter-attack

prediction_factors.note: Seize Group F control. High-scoring games (7 for, 3 against in 2 games).

Argentina.style_description: Messi-orchestrated attacking play. Strong midfield (Mac Allister, De Paul). Lautaro Martínez clinical finisher. Defending champions with elite mental strength. World power ranking #1 per Goal.com.
weaknesses: central defense can be exposed on transitions

prediction_factors.note: World #1 power ranking. Defending champions. 3-0 clean sheet vs Algeria impressive start.

France.style_description: Physical, direct, hard-pressing. Mbappé the danger man in central striker role. Griezmann creative playmaker. Strong midfield work rate. Won 3-1 vs Senegal convincingly.
weaknesses: can be slow to build up vs deep blocks

prediction_factors.note: Strong 3-1 win vs Senegal. Group I competitive with Norway. Key match vs Norway in MD3.

Norway.style_description: Everything funnelled to Erling Haaland. Physical direct play. Odegaard creative engine. 4-1 vs Iraq impressive. Surprisingly competitive vs France in Group I.

prediction_factors.note: Haaland-led Norway a genuine dark horse. 4-1 vs Iraq. Big France vs Norway clash MD3.

England.style_description: Physical pressing game with wide threats. Kane the focal point. Bellingham box-to-box dynamism. Saka creativity from right. Won 4-2 vs Croatia — high scoring but defensively concerning.

prediction_factors.note: 4-2 vs Croatia thrilling but defensive concerns. High-scoring games expected for England.

Spain.style_description: Classic Spanish possession football. Rodri/Pedri/Gavi midfield dominance. Young Yamal dangerous on right. HOWEVER — held 0-0 by Cabo Verde in MD1 was major shock. Power rankings fell significantly.
weaknesses: can be slow to penetrate deep blocks

wc_2026_stats.status: NEEDS result in MD2 vs Saudi Arabia (LIVE today)

prediction_factors.note: SURPRISE 0-0 vs Cabo Verde MD1. Power rankings dropped. MD2 vs Saudi Arabia currently LIVE.

Portugal.style_description: Portugal drawn 1-1 with DR Congo was a surprise. B. Fernandes orchestrating play. Félix dangerous on left. Ronaldo as captain leading by example. Technical quality but questions raised after draw.
weaknesses: Portugal drew vs DR Congo — concerning

prediction_factors.note: Draw vs DR Congo a big surprise. Portugal power rankings fell. Need win vs Uzbekistan MD2.

Belgium.style_description: Belgium drew 1-1 with Egypt in MD1. De Bruyne orchestrating. Lukaku as target man. Physical directness. Golden generation may be aging but still quality.

wc_2026_stats.status: MD2 vs Iran LIVE — pivotal match for Group G

prediction_factors.note: Drew 1-1 vs Egypt MD1. MD2 vs Iran currently LIVE.

Mexico.style_description: Mexico playing on home soil (Azteca advantage). Organized and energetic. First team to qualify MD2. Won Group A decisively with 2-0 and 1-0 wins.

prediction_factors.note: First team qualified. 2 clean sheets. Conservative but effective on home soil.

Canada.style_description: Canada energized by home crowd. 6-0 vs Qatar was statement. Jonathan David and Alphonso Davies key. Direct physical play with width. Top of Group B.

prediction_factors.note: 6-0 vs Qatar a massive statement. Home host advantage. Watch for knockouts.

Japan.style_description: Japan's technical pressing game surprised Netherlands with 2-2. Disciplined, hard-working, quick transitions. Best xG in tournament per search (1.33 per game).

prediction_factors.note: 2-2 vs Netherlands showed Japan quality. Best xG in tournament (1.33/game). MD2 vs Tunisia currently LIVE.

South Korea.style_description: South Korea beat Czech Republic 2-1 in MD1 but lost 0-1 to Mexico in MD2. Hwang In-beom and Son Heung-min (if fit) key creative forces.

prediction_factors.note: Beat Czech in MD1 but lost to Mexico MD2. Need MD3 result.

Switzerland.style_description: Switzerland well-organized. Drew MD1 vs Qatar then beat Bosnia 4-1 in MD2. Xhaka the midfield anchor. Balanced approach with good defensive structure.
weaknesses: can struggle vs elite possession teams

prediction_factors.note: 4-1 vs Bosnia a good statement. Level with Canada on points. Battle for Group B top spot.

Scotland.style_description: Scotland won MD1 vs Haiti 1-0 then lost MD2 0-1 to Morocco. Physical direct approach. Still in contention for third-place finish.

prediction_factors.note: Low-scoring games expected. Need MD3 result to advance.

Australia.style_description: Australia organized defensively. Won MD1 2-0 vs Turkey, lost MD2 0-2 to USA. Still in contention for second place behind USA.

prediction_factors.note: Won MD1 vs Turkey, lost MD2 vs USA. Level with Paraguay on points and GD.

Colombia.style_description: Colombia dominant 3-1 vs Uzbekistan in MD1. James Rodriguez creative hub. Luis Díaz dangerous on wing. South American flair with tactical discipline.
weaknesses: can be exposed defensively on counter

prediction_factors.note: Strong MD1 win. Top of Group K. James Rodriguez playing at his best.

Sweden.style_description: Sweden demolished Tunisia 5-1 in MD1 then lost 1-5 to Netherlands in MD2. Inconsistent but high-scoring. Isak and Gyokeres as strike partnership.

prediction_factors.note: High-scoring but defensively unreliable. Match vs Tunisia/Japan MD3 crucial.

Iran.style_description: Iran drew 2-2 with New Zealand in MD1. Disciplined defensive structure with counter. Sardar Azmoun the focal point.
weaknesses: limited attacking firepower vs elite teams

wc_2026_stats.status: MD2 vs Belgium LIVE tonight — huge match in Group G

prediction_factors.note: Surprised 2-2 vs New Zealand MD1. MD2 vs Belgium LIVE tonight — underdog but organized.

Uruguay.style_description: Uruguay traditional direct physical play. Núñez as goal threat. Bentancur midfield. Drew 1-1 vs Saudi Arabia in MD1. Playing Cabo Verde MD2 today — winnable game.
weaknesses: can be frustrated by organized defenses

prediction_factors.note: Experience at World Cups. Playing Cabo Verde MD2 today — should win and advance.

Ghana.style_description: Ghana 1-0 vs Panama in MD1. Narrow win. Kudus Mohammed the key creative player. Direct approach with physicality.

prediction_factors.note: Top of Group L with England. MD2 vs England is massive. Underdog but organized.

Paraguay.style_description: Paraguay beat Turkey 1-0 in MD2 after losing 1-4 to USA in MD1. Back in contention for second place alongside Australia.

prediction_factors.note: Level with Australia on 3pts/0GD. MD3 vs USA will be tough.

Curaçao.style_description: MAJOR UPSET team. Lost 1-7 to Germany but then beat Ecuador 1-0 in MD2. Dick Advocaat's organized defensive setup frustrated Ecuador completely. Backs-against-wall mentality.
weaknesses: limited attacking quality vs elite teams

wc_2026_stats.status: SURPRISE — in contention vs Ivory Coast MD3

prediction_factors.note: UPSET specialists. Beat Ecuador 1-0 is one of biggest WC 2026 upsets. High momentum for MD3.

Ivory Coast.style_description: Ivory Coast won MD1 1-0 vs Ecuador but lost MD2 1-2 to Germany in unlucky stoppage-time defeat. Kessié scored but Undav brace stole win. Still very much alive for qualification.

prediction_factors.note: Level with Curaçao on 3pts but -1 vs Curaçao's -5 GD. MD3 vs Curaçao — should advance.

Croatia.style_description: Croatia lost 2-4 to England in MD1. Modrić still trying to inspire. Aging generation struggling. Need big result vs Panama and England.

prediction_factors.note: Lost badly to England. Must beat Panama and hope for result. Modrić last WC?

Ecuador.style_description: ELIMINATED. Ecuador lost both MD1 (0-1 vs Ivory Coast) and MD2 (0-1 vs Curaçao in huge upset). Out of tournament.

prediction_factors.note: ELIMINATED. Massive underperformance. Lost to Curaçao 0-1 in tournament shock.

Haiti.style_description: ELIMINATED. Lost MD1 0-1 to Scotland and MD2 0-3 to Brazil. First team eliminated from WC 2026.

prediction_factors.note: ELIMINATED. First team out. Significant quality gap.

Turkey.style_description: EFFECTIVELY ELIMINATED. Lost both games 0-2 (vs Australia) and 0-1 (vs Paraguay). Need near-miracle in MD3.

prediction_factors.note: 0 goals in 2 WC games. Hakan Çalhanoğlu not in form. Very unlikely to advance.

biggest_wins.context: Tournament statement MD1 - biggest WC 2026 win so far
Netherlands seize Group F control MD2

biggest_upsets.context: Spain expected to win easily, held by minnows
Portugal one of pre-tournament favorites, drawn by DR Congo
South American side eliminated by Caribbean island nation
Japan held Netherlands — showing Japan's quality

research_sources: PMC article - Deep learning for sport event outcomes (2025)
Oxford Journal RSSSC - Bayesian state-space models for EPL (2025)
arxiv - Bayesian weighted discrete-time dynamic models 2025

recommended_improvements.name: Tournament xG multiplier
recommended_improvements.description: Apply team's actual WC xG per game as adjustment to base lambda. If a team scores 4.5 goals/game (Germany) vs xG 4.2, their effective lambda should be higher than ELO-based estimates alone.

recommended_improvements.name: Playing style adjustment
recommended_improvements.description: High-press teams (Germany, France) vs low-block counter teams (Morocco, Mexico) have different scoring patterns. Low-block teams inflate 0-0 and 1-0 probability vs Dixon-Coles prediction.

recommended_improvements.name: Bayesian sequential ELO updates
recommended_improvements.description: Current ELO K=40 for group stage. Bayesian state-space approach suggests dynamic K that increases with match importance and decreases uncertainty over time. Consider K=50 for early WC matches to build tournament picture faster.

recommended_improvements.name: Form recency weighting for WC context
recommended_improvements.description: WC matches should weight 3x more than club form. A team in great WC form (Germany 9 goals in 2) should boost their lambda significantly vs just using pre-tournament ELO.
recommended_improvements.implemented_in: wc_results_collector.py get_team_wc_form() already does this; composite_model should increase WC form weight.

recommended_improvements.name: Elimination/pressure factor
recommended_improvements.description: Teams needing a result in MD2/MD3 tend to take more risks. This inflates goals both ways. Predict higher-scoring games when both teams or one team needs a win to advance.
recommended_improvements.implemented_in: need to add pressure_factor to composite_model

recommended_improvements.name: xG vs actual goals correction
recommended_improvements.description: Germany is scoring 4.5 goals/game but xG suggests ~4.2. Teams overperforming xG should have a mild downward regression applied (they will likely score fewer in next match). Teams underperforming xG (Spain 0 goals vs 1.8 xG) should have upward adjustment.
